---
title: 'bad shared url'
---

# Steps to reproduce

As a host, create a session.
Example: <http://localhost:4321/host?code=5868&id=VELVETY-CUVEE>

First the copyLink button with the "host" url is not useful. Remove it.

Second, the "watsapp and imessage share button" do not build a "good" link.

As a participant when I want to use the link received it does not route  me directly to the session.

## Actual

Join my wine tasting at Sommelier Arena!
Code: 5868
👉 <https://sommelier-arena.ducatillon.net/play>

## Expected

Join my wine tasting at Sommelier Arena!
Code: 5868
👉 <https://sommelier-arena.ducatillon.net/play?code=5868>
